formula.description: sum of severity points per clause, capped at 100

justification: This contract scores 100/100 on the sign-as-is risk scale across 10 analysed clauses, comprising 4 critical clauses (25 pts each), 5 high clauses (12 pts each), 1 medium clause (5 pts each). The most significant risks are concentrated in: Clause 2 (PAYMENT TERMS), Clause 3 (DATA OWNERSHIP AND PROCESSING), Clause 5 (LIABILITY), Clause 10 (INDEMNIFICATION). These clauses create asymmetric obligations that could cause significant financial, legal, or reputational harm to the Client. Signing this contract as-is carries critical risk exposure for the Client based on the weighted severity distribution. The score is capped at 100. This assessment is AI-generated and does not constitute legal advice.
